@@
 def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_stage6(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_real_pipeline.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
     cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
     service = WorkerService(cfg)
@@
     assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == (
         "user supplied clip text"
     )
 
 
+def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
+    monkeypatch, tmp_path
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+
+    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
+    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="unit",
+        source_path=str(source),
+        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
+    )
+
+    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
+
+    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = output_dir
+        _ = task_id
+        _ = args
+        _ = kwargs
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
+
+    def finalize_stage9(
+        input_video,
+        *,
+        output_dir,
+        task_id,
+        keep_intermediate_files=False,
+        forum_post_info=None,
+        original_filename="",
+    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = input_video
+        _ = keep_intermediate_files
+        _ = forum_post_info
+        _ = original_filename
+        final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
+
+    raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
+    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
+
+    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
+    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
+    assert "processing_log" in roles
+    processing_log = roles["processing_log"]
+    assert str(processing_log.get("relative_path") or "").startswith("logs/")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").startswith("funclip_")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").endswith(".log")
+
+    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
+    logs = render_manifest.get("logs") or {}
+    assert logs.get("processing") == processing_log.get("artifact_id")
+
+    log_text = Path(str(processing_log.get("path"))).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    assert "internal video pipeline started" in log_text
+    assert task.task_id in log_text
+    assert "stage9_organize" in log_text
+
+
 def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
     service = WorkerService(cfg)
*** End Patch

_ test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact _

monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x000002132BAB6680>
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-206/test_internal_pipeline_real_vi0')

    def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
        monkeypatch, tmp_path
    ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
    
        source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
        source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
        task = UnifiedTask(
            task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
            task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
            source="unit",
            source_path=str(source),
            metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
        )
    
        final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
    
        def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = output_dir
            _ = task_id
            _ = args
            _ = kwargs
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
    
        def finalize_stage9(
            input_video,
            *,
            output_dir,
            task_id,
            keep_intermediate_files=False,
            forum_post_info=None,
            original_filename="",
        ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = keep_intermediate_files
            _ = forum_post_info
            _ = original_filename
            final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)

assistant #1382 commentary 12:58:43

我要开始改 apps/worker/service.py 和 domain/video/pipeline.py 了。思路是两层一起补：worker 在每个 task 运行期间挂一个线程隔离的 task-local file handler，pipeline 把 stage start / complete / fail 明确打到日志里，这样产出的 .log 既完整又能在并发下不串任务。

Tool Call #1383 apply_patch call_MDHaaezvt6QGocroGsAcskPI 12:59:33
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: d:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py @@ -from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread +from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thr...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py
@@
-from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread
+from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread, get_ident
@@
 INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE: dict[str, tuple[int, str]] = {
@@
 }
 
 
+class _TaskThreadLogFilter(logging.Filter):
+    def __init__(self, *, task_id: str, thread_id: int) -> None:
+        super().__init__()
+        self.task_id = task_id
+        self.thread_id = thread_id
+
+    def filter(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> bool:
+        record.clonecut_task_id = self.task_id
+        return int(getattr(record, "thread", -1)) == self.thread_id
+
+
 class WorkerService:
@@
     def _get_video_pipeline_runtime(self) -> Optional[VideoPipeline]:
         with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
             return self._video_pipeline_runtime
 
+    def _start_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        task: UnifiedTask,
+        task_dir: Path,
+    ) -> Tuple[Path, logging.Handler, List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]]]:
+        logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
+        logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
+        log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}.log"
+        counter = 1
+        while log_path.exists():
+            log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}_{counter}.log"
+            counter += 1
+
+        handler = logging.FileHandler(log_path, encoding="utf-8")
+        handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+        handler.addFilter(_TaskThreadLogFilter(task_id=task.task_id, thread_id=get_ident()))
+        handler.setFormatter(
+            logging.Formatter(
+                "%(asctime)s | %(levelname)-8s | task=%(clonecut_task_id)s | %(name)s | %(message)s",
+                datefmt="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
+            )
+        )
+
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]] = []
+        for logger_name in ("", "clonecut"):
+            target_logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
+            previous_level = int(target_logger.level)
+            logger_states.append((target_logger, previous_level))
+            if previous_level == logging.NOTSET or previous_level > logging.INFO:
+                target_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+
+        logging.getLogger().addHandler(handler)
+        return log_path, handler, logger_states
+
+    def _stop_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        handler: Optional[logging.Handler],
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]],
+    ) -> None:
+        if handler is not None:
+            root_logger = logging.getLogger()
+            try:
+                root_logger.removeHandler(handler)
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+            try:
+                handler.close()
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+
+        for target_logger, previous_level in reversed(logger_states):
+            try:
+                target_logger.setLevel(previous_level)
+            except Exception:
+                continue
+
     def _run_internal_video_pipeline(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
         task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
         task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
         source = Path(source_path)
-        if not source.exists():

-            task.current_stage = 0
-            raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")

-                source=source,
-                task_dir=task_dir,
-                stage_names=stage_names,
-                start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
-                reason="migration fallback: tiny input",
-            )
-        if not self._ensure_video_pipeline_runtime_ready(wait=True):
-            raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime not ready")

-            raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime unavailable")

-        with self._video_pipeline_run_semaphore:
-            with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
-                self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs += 1
-            try:
-                pipeline_result = pipeline.run(
-                    input_video=str(source),
-                    task_id=task.task_id,
-                    start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
-                    forum_post_info=dict(task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
-                    if isinstance(task.metadata, dict)
-                    else {},
-                )

-                self._clear_video_pipeline_runtime_state(last_error=str(exc))
-                raise
-            finally:
-                with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
-                    self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs = max(
-                        0,
-                        self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs - 1,
-                    )
-        elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
-
-        last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()
-        failed_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "failed_stage", "") or "").strip()
-        checkpoint = str(last_stage or failed_stage).strip()
-        if checkpoint:
-            task.stage_checkpoint = checkpoint
-        task.current_stage = int(getattr(pipeline_result, "current_stage", start_from_stage))
-        succeeded = bool(getattr(pipeline_result, "success", False))
-
-        output_path = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "output_file", "") or "").strip()

-            task_dir=task_dir,
-            output_path=output_path,
-            stage_name=checkpoint,
-            current_stage=task.current_stage,
-            failed_stage=failed_stage,
-            succeeded=succeeded,
-        )
-
-        if not succeeded:
-            error_message = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "error_message", "") or "").strip()
-            raise RuntimeError(error_message or "video pipeline failed")
-
-        return {
-            "success": True,
-            "request_type": task.task_type.value,
-            "output_path": output_path,
-            "executed_stages": list(getattr(pipeline_result, "executed_stages", []) or []),
-            "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",

-            ),
-        }
+        log_path, log_handler, logger_states = self._start_task_processing_log(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)
+        try:
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline started: task_id=%s source=%s log_path=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(source),
+                str(log_path),
+            )
+            if not source.exists():
+                task.stage_checkpoint = "stage0_clean"
+                task.current_stage = 0
+                raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")
+            stage_names = list(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER)
+            start_from_stage = 0
+            self._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)
+
+            if self._should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(source):
+                self.logger.info(
+                    "internal video pipeline using fallback copy: task_id=%s reason=%s",
+                    task.task_id,
+                    "migration fallback: tiny input",
+                )
+                return self._run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
+                    task=task,
+                    source=source,
+                    task_dir=task_dir,
+                    stage_names=stage_names,
+                    start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
+                    reason="migration fallback: tiny input",
+                )
+            if not self._ensure_video_pipeline_runtime_ready(wait=True):
+                raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime not ready")
+            pipeline = self._get_video_pipeline_runtime()
+            if pipeline is None:
+                raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime unavailable")
+            started = time.perf_counter()
+            with self._video_pipeline_run_semaphore:
+                with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
+                    self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs += 1
+                try:
+                    pipeline_result = pipeline.run(
+                        input_video=str(source),
+                        task_id=task.task_id,
+                        start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
+                        forum_post_info=dict(task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
+                        if isinstance(task.metadata, dict)
+                        else {},
+                    )
+                except Exception as exc:
+                    self._clear_video_pipeline_runtime_state(last_error=str(exc))
+                    raise
+                finally:
+                    with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
+                        self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs = max(
+                            0,
+                            self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs - 1,
+                        )
+            elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
+
+            last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()
+            failed_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "failed_stage", "") or "").strip()
+            checkpoint = str(last_stage or failed_stage).strip()
+            if checkpoint:
+                task.stage_checkpoint = checkpoint
+            task.current_stage = int(getattr(pipeline_result, "current_stage", start_from_stage))
+            succeeded = bool(getattr(pipeline_result, "success", False))
+
+            output_path = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "output_file", "") or "").strip()
+            self._write_internal_pipeline_state(
+                task_dir=task_dir,
+                output_path=output_path,
+                stage_name=checkpoint,
+                current_stage=task.current_stage,
+                failed_stage=failed_stage,
+                succeeded=succeeded,
+            )
+
+            if not succeeded:
+                error_message = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "error_message", "") or "").strip()
+                raise RuntimeError(error_message or "video pipeline failed")
+
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline completed: task_id=%s output_path=%s duration_ms=%s checkpoint=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                output_path,
+                elapsed_ms,
+                checkpoint or "stage9_organize",
+            )
+            return {
+                "success": True,
+                "request_type": task.task_type.value,
+                "output_path": output_path,
+                "executed_stages": list(getattr(pipeline_result, "executed_stages", []) or []),
+                "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",
+                "performance_summary": (
+                    str(getattr(pipeline_result, "performance_summary", "") or "").strip()
+                    or f"video pipeline executed duration_ms={elapsed_ms}"
+                ),
+            }
+        except Exception:
+            self.logger.exception(
+                "internal video pipeline failed: task_id=%s checkpoint=%s current_stage=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(task.stage_checkpoint or ""),
+                int(getattr(task, "current_stage", 0) or 0),
+            )
+            raise
+        finally:
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline log finalized: task_id=%s log_path=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(log_path),
+            )
+            self._stop_task_processing_log(handler=log_handler, logger_states=logger_states)
 
     def _should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(self, source: Path) -> bool:
*** End Patch

tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-207/test_internal_pipeline_real_vi0')

    def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
        monkeypatch, tmp_path
    ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
    
        source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
        source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
        task = UnifiedTask(
            task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
            task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
            source="unit",
            source_path=str(source),
            metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
        )
    
        final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
    
        def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = output_dir
            _ = task_id
            _ = args
            _ = kwargs
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
    
        def finalize_stage9(
            input_video,
            *,
            output_dir,
            task_id,
            keep_intermediate_files=False,
            forum_post_info=None,
            original_filename="",
        ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = keep_intermediate_files
            _ = forum_post_info
            _ = original_filename
            final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
    
        raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
        result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
    
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
        roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
        assert "processing_log" in roles
        processing_log = roles["processing_log"]

    8:     [string]$Stage5ModelName = "",

   14: 
   15: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path
   16: $clientScript = Join-Path $repoRoot "scripts\clonecut_task_client.py"
   17: $pythonCandidates = @(
   18:     (Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe")
   19: )
   20: 
   21: try {
   22:     $gitCommonDir = (& git -C $repoRoot rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir 2>$null).Trim()
   23:     if ($gitCommonDir) {
   24:         $sharedRepoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $gitCommonDir
   25:         $sharedPython = Join-Path $sharedRepoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe"
   26:         if ($sharedPython -notin $pythonCandidates) {
   27:             $pythonCandidates += $sharedPython
   28:         }
   29:     }
   30: } catch {
   31: }
   32: 
   33: $pythonBin = $pythonCandidates | Where-Object { Test-Path -LiteralPath $_ } | Select-Object -First 1
   34: 
   35: if (-not $pythonBin) {
   36:     throw "missing python runtime: expected one of $($pythonCandidates -join ', ')"
   37: }
   38: 
   39: if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $clientScript)) {
   40:     throw "missing client script: $clientScript"
   41: }
   42: 
   43: $args = @(
   44:     $clientScript,
   45:     "--api-base", $ApiBase,
   46:     "--file", $VideoPath,
   47:     "--source", $Source
   48: )
   49: 
   50: if ($ApiToken) { $args += @("--api-token", $ApiToken) }
   51: if ($TaskId) { $args += @("--task-id", $TaskId) }
   52: if ($Stage5ModelName) { $args += @("--stage5-model-name", $Stage5ModelName) }
   53: if ($ClipText) { $args += @("--clip-text", $ClipText) }
   54: if ($PostUrl) { $args += @("--post-url", $PostUrl) }
   55: if ($NoWait) { $args += "--no-wait" }
   56: if ($OutputJson) { $args += @("--output-json", $OutputJson) }
   57: 
   58: & $pythonBin @args
   59: exit $LASTEXITCODE

    1: #!/usr/bin/env node

    3: import { access, readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
    4: import { constants as fsConstants, existsSync, openAsBlob } from "node:fs";
    5: import path from "node:path";
    6: 
    7: async function isLikelyContainerRuntime() {
    8:   if (process.platform !== "linux") {
    9:     return false;
   10:   }
   11:   if (existsSync("/.dockerenv")) {
   12:     return true;
   13:   }
   14:   try {
   15:     const cgroup = await readFile("/proc/1/cgroup", "utf8");
   16:     return /(docker|containerd|kubepods|podman)/i.test(cgroup);
   17:   } catch {
   18:     return false;
   19:   }
   20: }
   21: 
   22: async function resolveDefaultApiBase() {
   23:   if (process.platform === "win32" || process.platform === "darwin") {
   24:     return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
   25:   }
   26:   if (await isLikelyContainerRuntime()) {
   27:     return "http://host.docker.internal:18100";
   28:   }
   29:   return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
   30: }
   31: 
   32: async function parseArgs(argv) {
   33:   const options = {
   34:     apiBase: await resolveDefaultApiBase(),
   35:     file: "",
   36:     apiToken: "",
   37:     apiTokenEnv: "CLONECUT_API_TOKEN",
   38:     taskId: "",
   39:     source: "clonecut_skill",
   40:     stage5ModelName: "",
   41:     clipText: "",
   42:     postUrl: "",
   43:     wait: true,
   44:     submitTimeoutSeconds: 30,
   45:     waitTimeoutSeconds: 1800,
   46:     pollIntervalSeconds: 5,
   47:     requestTimeoutSeconds: 15,
   48:     outputJson: "",
   49:   };
   50: 
   51:   for (let index = 0; index < argv.length; index += 1) {
   52:     const arg = String(argv[index] ?? "").trim();
   53:     const nextValue = () => {
   54:       index += 1;
   55:       if (index >= argv.length) {
   56:         throw new Error(`missing value for ${arg}`);
   57:       }
   58:       return String(argv[index] ?? "");
   59:     };
   60:     switch (arg) {
   61:       case "--api-base":
   62:         options.apiBase = nextValue();
   63:         break;
   64:       case "--file":
   65:         options.file = nextValue();
   66:         break;
   67:       case "--api-token":
   68:         options.apiToken = nextValue();
   69:         break;
   70:       case "--api-token-env":
   71:         options.apiTokenEnv = nextValue();
   72:         break;
   73:       case "--task-id":
   74:         options.taskId = nextValue();
   75:         break;
   76:       case "--source":
   77:         options.source = nextValue();
   78:         break;
   79:       case "--stage5-model-name":
   80:         options.stage5ModelName = nextValue();
   81:         break;
   82:       case "--clip-text":
   83:         options.clipText = nextValue();
   84:         break;
   85:       case "--post-url":
   86:         options.postUrl = nextValue();
   87:         break;
   88:       case "--no-wait":
   89:         options.wait = false;
   90:         break;
   91:       case "--submit-timeout-seconds":
   92:         options.submitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
   93:         break;
   94:       case "--wait-timeout-seconds":
   95:         options.waitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
   96:         break;
   97:       case "--poll-interval-seconds":
   98:         options.pollIntervalSeconds = Number(nextValue());
   99:         break;
  100:       case "--request-timeout-seconds":
  101:         options.requestTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
  102:         break;
  103:       case "--output-json":
  104:         options.outputJson = nextValue();
  105:         break;
  106:       case "--help":
  107:       case "-h":
  108:         printHelp();
  109:         process.exit(0);
  110:         break;
  111:       default:
  112:         throw new Error(`unknown argument: ${arg}`);
  113:     }
  114:   }
  115: 
  116:   if (!options.file) {
  117:     throw new Error("--file is required");
  118:   }
  119:   return options;
  120: }
  121: 
  122: function printHelp() {
  123:   const lines = [
  124:     "Usage: node run_clonecut_task.mjs --file <video> [options]",
  125:     "",
  126:     "Options:",
  127:     "  --api-base <url>                 CloneCut API base URL",
  128:     "  --file <path>                    Local video path to upload",
  129:     "  --api-token <token>              Optional CloneCut API token",
  130:     "  --api-token-env <name>           Optional env var for api token",
  131:     "  --task-id <id>                   Explicit task id",
  132:     "  --source <text>                  Task source marker",
  133:     "  --stage5-model-name <name>       Stage5 model/backend model id",
  134:     "  --clip-text <text>               Explicit clip text override",
  135:     "  --post-url <url>                 Optional forum post url",
  136:     "  --no-wait                        Submit without polling result",
  137:     "  --submit-timeout-seconds <n>     Submit request timeout",
  138:     "  --wait-timeout-seconds <n>       Total polling timeout",
  139:     "  --poll-interval-seconds <n>      Poll interval",
  140:     "  --request-timeout-seconds <n>    Single polling request timeout",
  141:     "  --output-json <path>             Persist final JSON payload",
  142:   ];
  143:   console.log(lines.join("\n"));
  144: }
  145: 
  146: function normalizeApiBase(apiBase) {
  147:   const text = String(apiBase ?? "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
  148:   if (!text) {
  149:     throw new Error("apiBase is required");
  150:   }
  151:   return text;
  152: }
  153: 
  154: function resolveApiUrl(apiBase, suffix) {
  155:   const base = normalizeApiBase(apiBase);
  156:   const pathSuffix = String(suffix ?? "").trim();
  157:   if (!pathSuffix) {
  158:     return base;
  159:   }
  160:   return pathSuffix.startsWith("/") ? `${base}${pathSuffix}` : `${base}/${pathSuffix}`;
  161: }
  162: 
  163: function buildHeaders(apiToken) {
  164:   const token = String(apiToken ?? "").trim();
  165:   return token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {};
  166: }
  167: 
  168: async function ensureFileExists(filePath) {
  169:   await access(filePath, fsConstants.R_OK);
  170: }
  171: 
  172: async function parseJsonResponse(response, context) {
  173:   const text = await response.text();
  174:   let payload;
  175:   try {
  176:     payload = JSON.parse(text);
  177:   } catch (error) {
  178:     throw new Error(
  179:       `${context} returned non-JSON response: status=${response.status} body=${text}`,
  180:       { cause: error },
  181:     );
  182:   }
  183:   if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload)) {
  184:     throw new Error(`${context} returned invalid payload type`);
  185:   }
  186:   if (!payload.success) {
  187:     const error = String(payload.error ?? "").trim() || `${context} failed`;
  188:     throw new Error(`${context} failed: status=${response.status} error=${error}`);
  189:   }
  190:   return payload;
  191: }
  192: 
  193: async function fetchJson(url, init, context, timeoutSeconds) {
  194:   const controller = new AbortController();
  195:   const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), Math.max(1, timeoutSeconds) * 1000);
  196:   try {
  197:     const response = await fetch(url, { ...init, signal: controller.signal });
  198:     return await parseJsonResponse(response, context);
  199:   } finally {
  200:     clearTimeout(timer);
  201:   }
  202: }
  203: 
  204: async function submitTask(options) {
  205:   const filePath = path.resolve(options.file);
  206:   await ensureFileExists(filePath);
  207: 
  208:   const form = new FormData();
  209:   form.set("source", String(options.source));
  210:   if (options.taskId) {
  211:     form.set("task_id", String(options.taskId));
  212:   }
  213:   if (options.stage5ModelName) {
  214:     form.set("stage5_model_name", String(options.stage5ModelName));
  215:   }
  216:   if (options.clipText) {
  217:     form.set("clip_text", String(options.clipText));
  218:   }
  219:   if (options.postUrl) {
  220:     form.set("post_url", String(options.postUrl));
  221:   }
  222: 
  223:   const blob = await openAsBlob(filePath);
  224:   const file = new File([blob], path.basename(filePath), {
  225:     type: filePath.toLowerCase().endsWith(".mp4") ? "video/mp4" : "application/octet-stream",
  226:   });
  227:   form.set("file", file, file.name);
  228: 
  229:   return fetchJson(
  230:     resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, "/api/tasks/video"),
  231:     {
  232:       method: "POST",
  233:       headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
  234:       body: form,
  235:     },
  236:     "submit video task",
  237:     options.submitTimeoutSeconds,
  238:   );
  239: }
  240: 
  241: async function fetchTaskResult(options, taskId) {
  242:   return fetchJson(
  243:     resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, `/api/tasks/${encodeURIComponent(taskId)}/result`),
  244:     {
  245:       method: "GET",
  246:       headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
  247:     },
  248:     "fetch task result",
  249:     options.requestTimeoutSeconds,
  250:   );
  251: }
  252: 
  253: async function waitForResult(options, taskId) {
  254:   const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(1, options.waitTimeoutSeconds) * 1000;
  255:   while (true) {
  256:     const payload = await fetchTaskResult(options, taskId);
  257:     const result =
  258:       payload.task_result && typeof payload.task_result === "object"
  259:         ? payload.task_result
  260:         : {};

Memory/03_chat_logs\2026-03-29_203444.md:6:助手: 启动了一组隔离的 API/worker 进程，使用独立 Redis namespace `clonecut_openclaw_smoke_20260329_1:` 与临时 DB 跑真实联调。先验证 `/health` 与 `/ready`，确认 `scope=video_pipeline` 且 `ready=true`；随后分别通过 `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1` 和 `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/run_clonecut_task.mjs` 提交 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4`，两条链路都返回 `task_result.status=completed`、`schema_version=1.0`、`executed_mode=video_pipeline`，并产出 `final_video`、`subtitle_srt`、`cover_image`、`clip_text`、`script_text` 等稳定 artifacts。之后继续验证 `/api/tasks/<task_id>`、`/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts`、以及成片/字幕/封面下载接口，确认平台侧读取与下载链路可用，最后关闭临时 API/worker 进程并将当前 todo 更新为“主链与 smoke checklist 已收口，下一步进入后置增强功能”。

Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d3916-07ec-74d3-9d3e-624387fd19e5__e3f42e23.html:20717:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$ErrorActionPreference = &#39;Stop&#39;\n$root = &#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;\n$py = Join-Path $root &#39;.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe&#39;\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP (&#39;clonecut-hardcut-smoke-&#39; + (Get-Date -Format &#39;yyyyMMdd-HHmmss&#39;))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;input&#39;\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;output&#39;\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;logs&#39;\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root &#39;config\\settings.yaml.example&#39;\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;settings.smoke.yaml&#39;\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;input_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;input_dir: &#39; + ($inputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;output_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;output_dir: &#39; + ($outputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;log_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;log_dir: &#39; + ($logDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;forum_upload_enabled: true&#39;, &#39;forum_upload_enabled: false&#39;\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0&#39;, &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576&#39;\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;smoke.db&#39;\n$ns = &#39;clonecut_hardcut_smoke:&#39; + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString(&#39;N&#39;).Substring(0,8) + &#39;:&#39;\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;worker.log&#39;\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;api.log&#39;\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;sample.mp4&#39;\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\n$envCommon = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = &#39;false&#39;\n  PYTHONUTF8 = &#39;1&#39;\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp\n      if (&amp; $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \&quot;timeout waiting for $url last=$last\&quot;\n}\ntry {\n  $workerEnv = [System.Collections.Hashtable]::Synchronized(@{})\n  Get-ChildItem Env: | ForEach-Object { $workerEnv[$_.Name] = $_.Value }\n  foreach ($k in $envCommon.Keys) { $workerEnv[$k] = $envCommon[$k] }\n  $apiEnv = [System.Collections.Hashtable]::Synchronized(@{})\n  Get-ChildItem Env: | ForEach-Object { $apiEnv[$_.Name] = $_.Value }\n  foreach ($k in $envCommon.Keys) { $apiEnv[$k] = $envCommon[$k] }\n  $apiEnv[&#39;CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER&#39;] = &#39;false&#39;\n\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList &#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.worker.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$workerPort -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $workerEnv\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList &#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.api.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$apiPort -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $apiEnv\n\n  Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true } \n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; }\n\n  $clientOut = &amp; $py (Join-Path $root &#39;scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py&#39;) --api-base (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}\&quot; -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2&gt;&amp;1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \&quot;client failed: $clientOut\&quot; }\n  $clientJson = $clientOut | Out-String\n  $payload = $clientJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw &#39;missing task_id in client payload&#39; }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw &#39;missing task_result in client payload&#39; }\n\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\&quot; -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  if ($apiProc -and -not $apiProc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $apiProc.Id -Force }\n  if ($workerProc -and -not $workerProc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $workerProc.Id -Force }\n}\n&quot;,
Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d3916-07ec-74d3-9d3e-624387fd19e5__e3f42e23.html:20812:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$ErrorActionPreference = &#39;Stop&#39;\n$root = &#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;\n$py = Join-Path $root &#39;.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe&#39;\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP (&#39;clonecut-hardcut-smoke-&#39; + (Get-Date -Format &#39;yyyyMMdd-HHmmss&#39;))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;input&#39;\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;output&#39;\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;logs&#39;\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root &#39;config\\settings.yaml.example&#39;\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;settings.smoke.yaml&#39;\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;input_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;input_dir: &#39; + ($inputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;output_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;output_dir: &#39; + ($outputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;log_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;log_dir: &#39; + ($logDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;forum_upload_enabled: true&#39;, &#39;forum_upload_enabled: false&#39;\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0&#39;, &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576&#39;\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;smoke.db&#39;\n$ns = &#39;clonecut_hardcut_smoke:&#39; + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString(&#39;N&#39;).Substring(0,8) + &#39;:&#39;\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;worker.log&#39;\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;api.log&#39;\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;sample.mp4&#39;\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  foreach ($arg in $arguments) { [void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add([string]$arg) }\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;REDIS_NAMESPACE&#39;] = $ns\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;CLONECUT_DB_PATH&#39;] = $dbPath\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE&#39;] = &#39;false&#39;\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;PYTHONUTF8&#39;] = &#39;1&#39;\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.Environment[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  $handler = {\n    param($sender, $eventArgs)\n    if ($eventArgs.Data) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $stdoutLog -Value $eventArgs.Data }\n  }\n  $proc.add_OutputDataReceived($handler)\n  $proc.add_ErrorDataReceived($handler)\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  $proc.BeginOutputReadLine()\n  $proc.BeginErrorReadLine()\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6\n      if (&amp; $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \&quot;timeout waiting for $url last=$last\&quot;\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @(&#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.worker.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @(&#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.api.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$apiPort) $apiLog @{ &#39;CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER&#39; = &#39;false&#39; }\n  Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; }\n\n  $clientOut = &amp; $py (Join-Path $root &#39;scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py&#39;) --api-base (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}\&quot; -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2&gt;&amp;1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \&quot;client failed: $clientOut\&quot; }\n  $payload = ($clientOut | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw &#39;missing task_id in client payload&#39; }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw &#39;missing task_result in client payload&#39; }\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\&quot; -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n&quot;,
Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d3916-07ec-74d3-9d3e-624387fd19e5__e3f42e23.html:20907:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$ErrorActionPreference = &#39;Stop&#39;\n$root = &#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;\n$py = Join-Path $root &#39;.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe&#39;\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP (&#39;clonecut-hardcut-smoke-&#39; + (Get-Date -Format &#39;yyyyMMdd-HHmmss&#39;))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;input&#39;\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;output&#39;\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;logs&#39;\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root &#39;config\\settings.yaml.example&#39;\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;settings.smoke.yaml&#39;\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;input_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;input_dir: &#39; + ($inputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;output_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;output_dir: &#39; + ($outputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;log_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;log_dir: &#39; + ($logDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;forum_upload_enabled: true&#39;, &#39;forum_upload_enabled: false&#39;\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0&#39;, &#39;internal_pipeline_m…252144 tokens truncated…3\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw &#39;client command failed&#39; }\n  $payload = ($payloadText | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\&quot; -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n&quot;,

Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d2453-7532-7590-8372-89da46658aee__737907ef.html:50742:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$env:CLONECUT_FORUM_UPLOAD_ENABLED=&#39;false&#39;; @&#39;\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport shutil\nimport time\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom types import SimpleNamespace\n\nfrom apps.api.main import create_app\nfrom apps.worker.service import WorkerService\n\nrepo = Path(r&#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;)\ntest_video = repo / &#39;input&#39; / &#39;test.mp4&#39;\nif not test_video.exists():\n    raise SystemExit(f&#39;missing test video: {test_video}&#39;)\n\ntmp_root = repo / &#39;.tmp_openclaw_api_smoke&#39;\nif tmp_root.exists():\n    shutil.rmtree(tmp_root)\n(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\nos.environ[&#39;CLONECUT_DB_PATH&#39;] = str(tmp_root / &#39;smoke.db&#39;)\n\ncfg = SimpleNamespace(\n    redis_host=&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,\n    redis_port=6379,\n    redis_db=0,\n    redis_password=&#39;&#39;,\n    redis_namespace=f\&quot;clonecut_openclaw_smoke_{int(time.time())}:\&quot;,\n    input_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;),\n    output_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;),\n    log_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;),\n    raw={\n        &#39;queue&#39;: {\n            &#39;max_retries&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;retry_backoff_seconds&#39;: [1],\n        },\n        &#39;worker&#39;: {\n            &#39;max_download_workers&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;max_process_workers&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;max_upload_workers&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;download_timeout_seconds&#39;: 30,\n            &#39;download_chunk_size&#39;: 4096,\n            &#39;use_internal_pipeline&#39;: True,\n            &#39;video_command_template&#39;: &#39;&#39;,\n            &#39;retry_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 0.2,\n            &#39;zombie_timeout_seconds&#39;: 60,\n            &#39;zombie_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;forum_upload_enabled&#39;: False,\n        },\n    },\n)\n\nservice = WorkerService(cfg)\nservice.start()\napp = create_app(service)\nclient = app.test_client()\n\nsummary = {}\ntry:\n    with test_video.open(&#39;rb&#39;) as f:\n        response = client.post(\n            &#39;/api/tasks/upload-video&#39;,\n            data={\n                &#39;file&#39;: (f, &#39;test.mp4&#39;),\n                &#39;task_type&#39;: &#39;video&#39;,\n                &#39;clip_text&#39;: &#39;删除口头禅、重复片段，保留主干表达&#39;,\n                &#39;stage5_model_name&#39;: &#39;yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4&#39;,\n            },\n            content_type=&#39;multipart/form-data&#39;,\n        )\n    upload_payload = response.get_json() or {}\n    if response.status_code != 201:\n        raise SystemExit(json.dumps({&#39;upload_status&#39;: response.status_code, &#39;payload&#39;: upload_payload}, ensure_ascii=False))\n\n    task_id = str(upload_payload.get(&#39;task_id&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()\n    if not task_id:\n        raise SystemExit(&#39;missing task_id from upload response&#39;)\n\n    final_task = {}\n    deadline = time.time() + 120\n    while time.time() &lt; deadline:\n        detail_resp = client.get(f&#39;/api/tasks/{task_id}&#39;)\n        detail_payload = detail_resp.get_json() or {}\n        final_task = detail_payload.get(&#39;task&#39;) or {}\n        status = str(final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip().lower()\n        if status in {&#39;completed&#39;, &#39;failed&#39;, &#39;cancelled&#39;}:\n            break\n        time.sleep(0.2)\n\n    status = str(final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip().lower()\n    download_info = {}\n    if status == &#39;completed&#39;:\n        download_resp = client.get(f&#39;/api/tasks/{task_id}/download&#39;)\n        download_path = tmp_root / &#39;downloaded_result.mp4&#39;\n        download_path.write_bytes(download_resp.data)\n        download_info = {\n            &#39;status_code&#39;: download_resp.status_code,\n            &#39;size_bytes&#39;: len(download_resp.data),\n            &#39;saved_to&#39;: str(download_path),\n        }\n    else:\n        download_info = {&#39;status_code&#39;: None, &#39;size_bytes&#39;: 0, &#39;saved_to&#39;: &#39;&#39;}\n\n    result = final_task.get(&#39;result&#39;) or {}\n    upload_result = result.get(&#39;upload&#39;) or {}\n    uploaded_path = str(upload_result.get(&#39;uploaded_path&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()\n    uploaded_exists = Path(uploaded_path).exists() if uploaded_path else False\n\n    stage_dir = tmp_root / &#39;output&#39; / task_id / &#39;_stages&#39;\n    artifacts = []\n    if stage_dir.exists():\n        artifacts = sorted(str(p.relative_to(tmp_root)) for p in stage_dir.rglob(&#39;*&#39;) if p.is_file())\n\n    summary = {\n        &#39;task_id&#39;: task_id,\n        &#39;upload_response&#39;: upload_payload,\n        &#39;final_status&#39;: status,\n        &#39;error_message&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;error_message&#39;),\n        &#39;engine&#39;: result.get(&#39;engine&#39;),\n        &#39;executed_mode&#39;: result.get(&#39;executed_mode&#39;),\n        &#39;output_path&#39;: result.get(&#39;output_path&#39;),\n        &#39;named_output_path&#39;: result.get(&#39;named_output_path&#39;),\n        &#39;uploaded_path&#39;: uploaded_path,\n        &#39;uploaded_exists&#39;: uploaded_exists,\n        &#39;download&#39;: download_info,\n        &#39;artifacts&#39;: artifacts,\n    }\n    print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\nfinally:\n    service.stop()\n&#39;@ | .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -&quot;,
Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d2453-7532-7590-8372-89da46658aee__737907ef.html:53106:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$env:CLONECUT_FORUM_UPLOAD_ENABLED=&#39;false&#39;; $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL=&#39;http://127.0.0.1:18789/v1&#39;; $env:OPENAI_MODEL=&#39;openclaw&#39;; $env:OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL=&#39;yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4&#39;; $env:OPENAI_API_KEY=(Get-Content D:\\openclaw_docker_state\\gateway_token.txt -Raw).Trim(); @&#39;\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport shutil\nimport time\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom types import SimpleNamespace\n\nfrom apps.api.main import create_app\nfrom apps.worker.service import WorkerService\n\nrepo = Path(r&#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;)\ntest_video = repo / &#39;input&#39; / &#39;test.mp4&#39;\ntmp_root = repo / &#39;.tmp_openclaw_api_smoke_realtry&#39;\nif tmp_root.exists():\n    shutil.rmtree(tmp_root)\n(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nos.environ[&#39;CLONECUT_DB_PATH&#39;] = str(tmp_root / &#39;smoke.db&#39;)\n\ncfg = SimpleNamespace(\n    redis_host=&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;, redis_port=6379, redis_db=0, redis_password=&#39;&#39;,\n    redis_namespace=f\&quot;clonecut_openclaw_realtry_{int(time.time())}:\&quot;,\n    input_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;), output_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;), log_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;),\n    raw={&#39;queue&#39;: {&#39;max_retries&#39;: 0, &#39;retry_backoff_seconds&#39;: [1]}, &#39;worker&#39;: {\n        &#39;max_download_workers&#39;: 1, &#39;max_process_workers&#39;: 1, &#39;max_upload_workers&#39;: 1,\n        &#39;use_internal_pipeline&#39;: True, &#39;forum_upload_enabled&#39;: False,\n        &#39;retry_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 0.2, &#39;zombie_timeout_seconds&#39;: 120, &#39;zombie_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 1,\n    }}\n)\nservice = WorkerService(cfg)\nservice.start()\napp = create_app(service)\nclient = app.test_client()\ntry:\n    with test_video.open(&#39;rb&#39;) as f:\n        resp = client.post(&#39;/api/tasks/upload-video&#39;, data={&#39;file&#39;: (f, &#39;test.mp4&#39;), &#39;task_type&#39;: &#39;video&#39;, &#39;clip_text&#39;: &#39;删除重复和停顿&#39;}, content_type=&#39;multipart/form-data&#39;)\n    payload = resp.get_json() or {}\n    task_id = payload[&#39;task_id&#39;]\n    deadline = time.time() + 300\n    final_task = {}\n    while time.time() &lt; deadline:\n        detail = client.get(f&#39;/api/tasks/{task_id}&#39;)\n        final_task = (detail.get_json() or {}).get(&#39;task&#39;) or {}\n        if str(final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).lower() in {&#39;completed&#39;, &#39;failed&#39;, &#39;cancelled&#39;}:\n            break\n        time.sleep(0.2)\n    print(json.dumps({\n        &#39;task_id&#39;: task_id,\n        &#39;status&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;),\n        &#39;error_message&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;error_message&#39;),\n        &#39;result&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;result&#39;),\n    }, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\nfinally:\n    service.stop()\n&#39;@ | .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -&quot;,

   13:     repo_root_text = str(repo_root)

   21: from apps.api.task_client import run_video_task
   22: 
   23: 
   24: def _parse_args(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
   25:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Submit CloneCut video task and fetch canonical task_result payload")
   26:     parser.add_argument("--api-base", default="http://127.0.0.1:18100", help="CloneCut API base URL")
   27:     parser.add_argument("--file", required=True, help="Local video path to upload")
   28:     parser.add_argument("--api-token", default="", help="CloneCut API token, optional")
   29:     parser.add_argument("--api-token-env", default="CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", help="fallback env name for api token")
   30:     parser.add_argument("--task-id", default="", help="optional explicit task id")
   31:     parser.add_argument("--source", default="clonecut_task_client", help="task source marker")
   32:     parser.add_argument("--stage5-model-name", default="", help="stage5 model name or backend model id")
   33:     parser.add_argument("--clip-text", default="", help="optional explicit clip text override")
   34:     parser.add_argument("--post-url", default="", help="optional forum post url")
   35:     parser.add_argument("--no-wait", action="store_true", help="only submit task without polling result")
   36:     parser.add_argument("--submit-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=30.0, help="submit request timeout")
   37:     parser.add_argument("--wait-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=1800.0, help="poll total timeout")
   38:     parser.add_argument("--poll-interval-seconds", type=float, default=5.0, help="poll interval")
   39:     parser.add_argument("--request-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=15.0, help="single polling request timeout")
   40:     parser.add_argument("--output-json", default="", help="optional path to persist final json result")
   41:     return parser.parse_args(list(argv) if argv is not None else None)
   42: 
   43: 
   44: def main(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> int:
   45:     args = _parse_args(argv)
   46:     api_token = str(args.api_token or "").strip() or str(os.getenv(args.api_token_env, "") or "").strip()
   47: 
   48:     extra_form: dict[str, str] = {}
   49:     if args.clip_text:
   50:         extra_form["clip_text"] = str(args.clip_text)
   51:     if args.post_url:
   52:         extra_form["post_url"] = str(args.post_url)
   53: 
   54:     payload = run_video_task(
   55:         api_base=args.api_base,
   56:         video_path=args.file,
   57:         api_token=api_token,
   58:         task_id=args.task_id,
   59:         source=args.source,
   60:         stage5_model_name=args.stage5_model_name,
   61:         extra_form=extra_form,
   62:         wait=not bool(args.no_wait),
   63:         submit_timeout_seconds=float(args.submit_timeout_seconds),
   64:         wait_timeout_seconds=float(args.wait_timeout_seconds),
   65:         poll_interval_seconds=float(args.poll_interval_seconds),
   66:         request_timeout_seconds=float(args.request_timeout_seconds),
   67:     )
   68:     text = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   69:     print(text)
   70: 
   71:     output_json = str(args.output_json or "").strip()
   72:     if output_json:
   73:         output_path = Path(output_json).expanduser()
   74:         output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   75:         output_path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
   76:     return 0
   77: 
   78: 
   79: if __name__ == "__main__":
   80:     raise SystemExit(main())

shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (G...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18125\n$apiPort = 18120\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  foreach ($arg in $arguments) { [void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add([string]$arg) }\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  foreach ($entry in [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariables().GetEnumerator()) {\n    $psi.Environment[[string]$entry.Key] = [string]$entry.Value\n  }\n  $psi.Environment['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.Environment['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.Environment['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.Environment['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.Environment[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  $handler = {\n    param($sender, $eventArgs)\n    if ($eventArgs.Data) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $stdoutLog -Value $eventArgs.Data }\n  }\n  $proc.add_OutputDataReceived($handler)\n  $proc.add_ErrorDataReceived($handler)\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  $proc.BeginOutputReadLine()\n  $proc.BeginErrorReadLine()\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) $apiLog @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText '删除口头禅、重复片段，保留主干表达' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

assistant #1472 commentary 13:13:23

真实 smoke 第一次卡在启动脚本兼容性上了，不是业务失败，是 PowerShell 这边 ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList 在当前环境里不可用。我换回之前已经跑通过的 Start-Process -Environment 方案继续做联调，业务验证还在推进。

Tool Call #1473 shell_command call_nsC4XrVdYeJmn7eX0zoeo79i 13:13:55
shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (G...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18125\n$apiPort = 18120\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerEnv = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n}\n$apiEnv = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $workerEnv\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $apiEnv\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText '删除口头禅、重复片段，保留主干表达' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

(Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json last=$last\"\n}\n$oldRedisNs = $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE\n$oldDbPath = $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH\n$oldTts = $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE\n$oldUtf8 = $env:PYTHONUTF8\n$oldApiStartWorker = $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  $env:PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n  $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText '删除口头禅、重复片段，保留主干表达' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n  if ($null -ne $oldRedisNs) { $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $oldRedisNs } else { Remove-Item Env:REDIS_NAMESPACE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldDbPath) { $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $oldDbPath } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldTts) { $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = $oldTts } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldUtf8) { $env:PYTHONUTF8 = $oldUtf8 } else { Remove-Item Env:PYTHONUTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldApiStartWorker) { $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = $oldApiStartWorker } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

$workerErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n  $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList
