Hidden\n\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText '删除口头禅、重复片段，保留主干表达' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n  if ($null -ne $oldRedisNs) { $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $oldRedisNs } else { Remove-Item Env:REDIS_NAMESPACE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldDbPath) { $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $oldDbPath } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldTts) { $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = $oldTts } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldUtf8) { $env:PYTHONUTF8 = $oldUtf8 } else { Remove-Item Env:PYTHONUTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldApiStartWorker) { $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = $oldApiStartWorker } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_detail_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_detail_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18127\n$apiPort = 18122\n$workerOut = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.out.log'\n$workerErr = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.err.log'\n$apiOut = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.out.log'\n$apiErr = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.err.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$oldRedisNs = $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE\n$oldDbPath = $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH\n$oldTts = $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE\n$oldUtf8 = $env:PYTHONUTF8\n$oldApiStartWorker = $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  $env:PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerOut -RedirectStandardError $workerErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n  $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiOut -RedirectStandardError $apiErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true } | Out-Null\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText '删除口头禅、重复片段，保留主干表达' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  $detailPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $detailPayload.task.status\n    manifest_log_processing = $detailPayload.task.result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    outputs_processing_log_filename = $payload.result.task_result.outputs.processing_log.filename\n    outputs_processing_log_path = $payload.result.task_result.outputs.processing_log.path\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n  if ($null -ne $oldRedisNs) { $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $oldRedisNs } else { Remove-Item Env:REDIS_NAMESPACE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldDbPath) { $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $oldDbPath } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldTts) { $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = $oldTts } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldUtf8) { $env:PYTHONUTF8 = $oldUtf8 } else { Remove-Item Env:PYTHONUTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldApiStartWorker) { $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = $oldApiStartWorker } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

Tool Result #1500 shell_command call_88SAtFfHS0LHwcKOhaQenl6j exit 0 13:17:04

Output:
---
name: verification-before-completion
description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
---

# Verification Before Completion

## Overview

Claiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.

**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.

**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
```

If you haven't run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.

## The Gate Function

```
BEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:

1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)
3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?
   - If NO: State actual status with evidence
   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence
5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim

Skip any step = lying, not verifying
```

## Common Failures

| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, "should pass" |
| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |
| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |
| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |
| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |
| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports "success" |
| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |

## Red Flags - STOP

- Using "should", "probably", "seems to"
- Expressing satisfaction before verification ("Great!", "Perfect!", "Done!", etc.)
- About to commit/push/PR without verification
- Trusting agent success reports
- Relying on partial verification
- Thinking "just this once"
- Tired and wanting work over
- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**

## Rationalization Prevention

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Should work now" | RUN the verification |
| "I'm confident" | Confidence 鈮?evidence |
| "Just this once" | No exceptions |
| "Linter passed" | Linter 鈮?compiler |
| "Agent said success" | Verify independently |
| "I'm tired" | Exhaustion 鈮?excuse |
| "Partial check is enough" | Partial proves nothing |
| "Different words so rule doesn't apply" | Spirit over letter |

## Key Patterns

**Tests:**
```
鉁?[Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] "All tests pass"
鉂?"Should pass now" / "Looks correct"
```

**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**
```
鉁?Write 鈫?Run (pass) 鈫?Revert fix 鈫?Run (MUST FAIL) 鈫?Restore 鈫?Run (pass)
鉂?"I've written a regression test" (without red-green verification)
```

**Build:**
```
鉁?[Run build] [See: exit 0] "Build passes"
鉂?"Linter passed" (linter doesn't check compilation)
```

**Requirements:**
```
鉁?Re-read plan 鈫?Create checklist 鈫?Verify each 鈫?Report gaps or completion
鉂?"Tests pass, phase complete"
```

**Agent delegation:**
```
鉁?Agent reports success 鈫?Check VCS diff 鈫?Verify changes 鈫?Report actual state
鉂?Trust agent report
```

## Why This Matters

From 24 failure memories:
- your human partner said "I don't believe you" - trust broken
- Undefined functions shipped - would crash
- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features
- Time wasted on false completion 鈫?redirect 鈫?rework
- Violates: "Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you'll be replaced."

## When To Apply

**ALWAYS before:**
- ANY variation of success/completion claims
- ANY expression of satisfaction
- ANY positive statement about work state
- Committing, PR creation, task completion
- Moving to next task
- Delegating to agents

**Rule applies to:**
- Exact phrases
- Paraphrases and synonyms
- Implications of success
- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness

## The Bottom Line

**No shortcuts for verification.**

Run the command. Read the output. THEN claim the result.

This is non-negotiable.
Tool Result #1501 shell_command call_AldOija5n0g61tfqboC117ck exit 0 13:17:04
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: --- name: requesting-code-review description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify wor...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
---
name: requesting-code-review
description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
---

# Requesting Code Review

Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent to catch issues before they cascade. The reviewer gets precisely crafted context for evaluation 鈥?never your session's history. This keeps the reviewer focused on the work product, not your thought process, and preserves your own context for continued work.

**Core principle:** Review early, review often.

## When to Request Review

**Mandatory:**
- After each task in subagent-driven development
- After completing major feature
- Before merge to main

**Optional but valuable:**
- When stuck (fresh perspective)
- Before refactoring (baseline check)
- After fixing complex bug

## How to Request

**1. Get git SHAs:**
```bash
BASE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD~1)  # or origin/main
HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
```

**2. Dispatch code-reviewer subagent:**

Use Task tool with superpowers:code-reviewer type, fill template at `code-reviewer.md`

**Placeholders:**
- `{WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED}` - What you just built
- `{PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS}` - What it should do
- `{BASE_SHA}` - Starting commit
- `{HEAD_SHA}` - Ending commit
- `{DESCRIPTION}` - Brief summary

**3. Act on feedback:**
- Fix Critical issues immediately
- Fix Important issues before proceeding
- Note Minor issues for later
- Push back if reviewer is wrong (with reasoning)

## Example

```
[Just completed Task 2: Add verification function]

You: Let me request code review before proceeding.

BASE_SHA=$(git log --oneline | grep "Task 1" | head -1 | awk '{print $1}')
HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)

[Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent]
  WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED: Verification and repair functions for conversation index
  PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS: Task 2 from docs/superpowers/plans/deployment-plan.md
  BASE_SHA: a7981ec
  HEAD_SHA: 3df7661
  DESCRIPTION: Added verifyIndex() and repairIndex() with 4 issue types

[Subagent returns]:
  Strengths: Clean architecture, real tests
  Issues:
    Important: Missing progress indicators
    Minor: Magic number (100) for reporting interval
  Assessment: Ready to proceed

You: [Fix progress indicators]
[Continue to Task 3]
```

## Integration with Workflows

**Subagent-Driven Development:**
- Review after EACH task
- Catch issues before they compound
- Fix before moving to next task

**Executing Plans:**
- Review after each batch (3 tasks)
- Get feedback, apply, continue

**Ad-Hoc Development:**
- Review before merge
- Review when stuck

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Skip review because "it's simple"
- Ignore Critical issues
- Proceed with unfixed Important issues
- Argue with valid technical feedback

**If reviewer wrong:**
- Push back with technical reasoning
- Show code/tests that prove it works
- Request clarification

See template at: requesting-code-review/code-reviewer.md

diff --git a/apps/worker/service.py b/apps/worker/service.py
index afba494..6fd81c3 100644
--- a/apps/worker/service.py
+++ b/apps/worker/service.py
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ from pathlib import Path
 import re
 import shutil
 import subprocess
-from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread
+from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread, get_ident
 import time
 from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
 from urllib.parse import unquote, urlparse
@@ -77,6 +77,17 @@ INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE: dict[str, tuple[int, str]] = {
 }
 
 
+class _TaskThreadLogFilter(logging.Filter):
+    def __init__(self, *, task_id: str, thread_id: int) -> None:
+        super().__init__()
+        self.task_id = task_id
+        self.thread_id = thread_id
+
+    def filter(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> bool:
+        record.clonecut_task_id = self.task_id
+        return int(getattr(record, "thread", -1)) == self.thread_id
+
+
 class WorkerService:
     def __init__(self, config: Any, logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None) -> None:
         self.config = config
@@ -1498,89 +1509,184 @@ class WorkerService:
         with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
             return self._video_pipeline_runtime
 
+    def _start_task_processing_log(
+        self,

+        task: UnifiedTask,
+        task_dir: Path,
+    ) -> Tuple[Path, logging.Handler, List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]]]:
+        logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
+        logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
+        log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}.log"
+        counter = 1
+        while log_path.exists():
+            log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}_{counter}.log"
+            counter += 1
+
+        handler = logging.FileHandler(log_path, encoding="utf-8")
+        handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+        handler.addFilter(_TaskThreadLogFilter(task_id=task.task_id, thread_id=get_ident()))
+        handler.setFormatter(
+            logging.Formatter(
+                "%(asctime)s | %(levelname)-8s | task=%(clonecut_task_id)s | %(name)s | %(message)s",
+                datefmt="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
+            )
+        )
+
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]] = []
+        for logger_name in ("", "clonecut"):
+            target_logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
+            previous_level = int(target_logger.level)
+            logger_states.append((target_logger, previous_level))
+            if previous_level == logging.NOTSET or previous_level > logging.INFO:
+                target_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+
+        logging.getLogger().addHandler(handler)
+        return log_path, handler, logger_states
+
+    def _stop_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        handler: Optional[logging.Handler],
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]],
+    ) -> None:
+        if handler is not None:
+            root_logger = logging.getLogger()
+            try:
+                root_logger.removeHandler(handler)
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+            try:
+                handler.close()
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+
+        for target_logger, previous_level in reversed(logger_states):
+            try:
+                target_logger.setLevel(previous_level)
+            except Exception:
+                continue
+
     def _run_internal_video_pipeline(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
         task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
         task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
         source = Path(source_path)
-        if not source.exists():
-            task.stage_checkpoint = "stage0_clean"
-            task.current_stage = 0
-            raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")

-        start_from_stage = 0

-                reason="migration fallback: tiny input",

+                task.task_id,
+                str(source),
+                str(log_path),
             )

-                    input_video=str(source),
-                    task_id=task.task_id,
+            if not source.exists():
+                task.stage_checkpoint = "stage0_clean"
+                task.current_stage = 0
+                raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")
+            stage_names = list(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER)
+            start_from_stage = 0

+                    task_dir=task_dir,
+                    stage_names=stage_names,
                     start_from_stage=start_from_stage,

                 )

-                raise

+                raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime unavailable")

+                        input_video=str(source),
+                        task_id=task.task_id,
+                        start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
+                        forum_post_info=dict(task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
+                        if isinstance(task.metadata, dict)
+                        else {},
                     )
-        elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
-
-        last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()

+                except Exception as exc:
+                    self._clear_video_pipeline_runtime_state(last_error=str(exc))
+                    raise
+                finally:
+                    with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
+                        self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs = max(
+                            0,
+                            self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs - 1,
+                        )
+            elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
+
+            last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()
+            failed_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "failed_stage", "") or "").strip()
+            checkpoint = str(last_stage or failed_stage).strip()
+            if checkpoint:
+                task.stage_checkpoint = checkpoint
+            task.current_stage = int(getattr(pipeline_result, "current_stage", start_from_stage))
+            succeeded = bool(getattr(pipeline_result, "success", False))
+
+            output_path = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "output_file", "") or "").strip()

+                task_dir=task_dir,
+                output_path=output_path,

+            )
 
-        if not succeeded:

-        return {
-            "success": True,
-            "request_type": task.task_type.value,

-            "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",

-                str(getattr(pipeline_result, "performance_summary", "") or "").strip()
-                or f"video pipeline executed duration_ms={elapsed_ms}"
-            ),
-        }
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline completed: task_id=%s output_path=%s duration_ms=%s checkpoint=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                output_path,
+                elapsed_ms,
+                checkpoint or "stage9_organize",
+            )
+            return {
+                "success": True,
+                "request_type": task.task_type.value,
+                "output_path": output_path,
+                "executed_stages": list(getattr(pipeline_result, "executed_stages", []) or []),
+                "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",
+                "performance_summary": (
+                    str(getattr(pipeline_result, "performance_summary", "") or "").strip()
+                    or f"video pipeline executed duration_ms={elapsed_ms}"
+                ),
+            }
+        except Exception:
+            self.logger.exception(
+                "internal video pipeline failed: task_id=%s checkpoint=%s current_stage=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(task.stage_checkpoint or ""),
+                int(getattr(task, "current_stage", 0) or 0),
+            )
+            raise
+        finally:
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline log finalized: task_id=%s log_path=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(log_path),
+            )
+            self._stop_task_processing_log(handler=log_handler, logger_states=logger_states)
 
     def _should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(self, source: Path) -> bool:
         threshold_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes", 0)

+++ b/domain/video/pipeline.py
@@ -118,6 +118,12 @@ class VideoPipeline:
         gpu_stage_indexes = {1, 2, 4, 6}
         tracking_started = False
 
+        self.logger.info(
+            "pipeline run started: task=%s start_from_stage=%s input=%s",
+            task_id,
+            stage_start,
+            input_video,
+        )
         if self.performance_tracker is not None:
             try:
                 path = Path(input_video)
@@ -140,6 +146,7 @@ class VideoPipeline:
             if idx < stage_start:
                 continue
 
+            self.logger.info("pipeline stage started: task=%s stage=%s input=%s", task_id, stage_name, current)
             if self.resource_monitor is not None:
                 try:
                     self.resource_monitor.record_step_resource(
@@ -173,6 +180,7 @@ class VideoPipeline:
                     except Exception:
                         pass
                 perf_report = self._finish_tracking(task_id, tracking_started)
+                self.logger.exception("pipeline stage raised exception: task=%s stage=%s", task_id, stage_name)
                 return PipelineResult(
                     success=False,
                     output_file=current,
@@ -203,6 +211,12 @@ class VideoPipeline:
                     except Exception:
                         pass
                 perf_report = self._finish_tracking(task_id, tracking_started)
+                self.logger.error(
+                    "pipeline stage failed: task=%s stage=%s error=%s",
+                    task_id,
+                    stage_name,
+                    str(result.error_message or f"{stage_name} failed"),

                     success=False,

@@ -224,6 +238,7 @@ class VideoPipeline:
                     pass
             if result.output_file:
                 current = result.output_file
+            self.logger.info("pipeline stage completed: task=%s stage=%s output=%s", task_id, stage_name, current)
 
         perf_report = self._finish_tracking(task_id, tracking_started)
         summary = f"internal pipeline executed stages={len(executed)}"
@@ -234,6 +249,7 @@ class VideoPipeline:
                     summary = f"internal pipeline executed stages={len(executed)} speed={ratio:.2f}x"
             except Exception:
                 pass
+        self.logger.info("pipeline run completed: task=%s stages=%s output=%s", task_id, len(executed), current)
         return PipelineResult(
             success=True,
             output_file=current,
diff --git a/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py b/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
index 9798502..78f42d7 100644
--- a/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
+++ b/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
@@ -480,6 +480,85 @@ def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_sta
     )
 
 
+def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
+    monkeypatch, tmp_path
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+
+    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
+    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="unit",
+        source_path=str(source),
+        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
+    )
+
+    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
+
+    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = output_dir
+        _ = task_id
+        _ = args
+        _ = kwargs
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
+
+    def finalize_stage9(
+        input_video,
+        *,
+        output_dir,
+        task_id,
+        keep_intermediate_files=False,
+        forum_post_info=None,
+        original_filename="",
+    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = input_video
+        _ = keep_intermediate_files
+        _ = forum_post_info
+        _ = original_filename
+        final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
+
+    raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
+    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
+
+    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
+    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
+    assert "processing_log" in roles
+    processing_log = roles["processing_log"]
+    relative_path = str(processing_log.get("relative_path") or "").replace("\\", "/")
+    assert relative_path.startswith("logs/")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").startswith("funclip_")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").endswith(".log")
+
+    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
+    logs = render_manifest.get("logs") or {}
+    assert logs.get("processing") == processing_log.get("artifact_id")
+
+    log_text = Path(str(processing_log.get("path"))).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    assert "internal video pipeline started" in log_text
+    assert task.task_id in log_text
+    assert "stage9_organize" in log_text
+
+
 def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)

apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Add File: d:\clonecut\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v5.md +# 项目待办 + +## 绑定信息 +- 目标版本: goal_v2 +- 待办版本: v2_5 +- 创建日期: 2026-03-29 +- 状态: 当前生效 + +## 当前阶段结论 +- 主链...

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v5.md
+# 项目待办
+
+## 绑定信息
+- 目标版本: goal_v2
+- 待办版本: v2_5
+- 创建日期: 2026-03-29
+- 状态: 当前生效
+
+## 当前阶段结论
+- 主链收口基本完成，当前已从“主链建设期”转入“平台适配说明补完期”。
+- 当前不是“还能不能跑”的阶段，而是“把边界说明补齐，让更多平台按同一标准接入”的阶段。
+- 方案B继续保持硬切口径：不恢复 `openclaw_*` 兼容别名，不恢复旧 adapter/runner 回到主路径。
+- 截至 2026-03-29 晚间，完整 OpenClaw smoke checklist 已补跑通过；主链、canonical 入口、平台适配说明与真实联调结果已形成闭环。
+- 截至 2026-03-29 21:16，任务级 `processing_log` 已按 task-local artifact 方式补齐，真实 smoke 已验证 `task_result.outputs.processing_log`、`/api/tasks/<task_id>` 下 `render_manifest.logs.processing` 与日志下载链路均可用。
+
+## 已完成
+- `domain/video/stages/` 已恢复。
+- worker 通用视频主路径已切到 `VideoPipeline`。
+- worker 常驻资源治理、`ready gate`、并发限制已落地。
+- canonical API/CLI 已落地：`apps/api/task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`、`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`。
+- canonical 结果契约已固定为 `task_result` + `render_manifest`，结果接口为 `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`。
+- OpenClaw 已切到 canonical 入口。
+- `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 的 canonical CLI 实烟已通过。
+- OpenClaw helper 实烟已通过。
+- `/ready` 已明确为 `scope=video_pipeline`。
+- Phase 8 旧 `pre` 主链运行时依赖清理已完成。
+- `adapters/video_pipeline/`、`apps/api/openclaw_client.py`、`scripts/openclaw_*` 等旧入口已下线。
+- focused suite 已通过，主链与结果契约已有稳定验证基线。
+- 任务级 `processing_log` 已落地为 `output/<task_id>/logs/funclip_*.log`，并随 `artifacts` / `render_manifest` / `task_result.outputs.processing_log` 稳定暴露。
+
+## 当前进行中
+- 当前主链、平台适配说明、smoke checklist 与任务级日志契约已全部收口；如继续推进，下一步进入后置增强功能。
+
+## 待完成
+- 进入后置增强功能设计与排期。
+
+## 后置优化待办
+- `fast` / `standard` / `full`
+- 自然语言到结构化执行选项映射
+- “只剪辑 / 字幕 / 封面”能力表达层
+- 封面标题策略细化
+- 更细粒度性能指标与批处理优化
+
+## 变更记录
+- 2026-03-29: 方案B主链完成硬切同步，worker、canonical API/CLI、`task_result` 契约、OpenClaw 接入与旧主链运行时依赖清理全部对齐；当前阶段切换为平台适配说明补完。
+- 2026-03-29: 补回 `domain/video/asr` 兼容模块以跑通 `test_asr_engine_factory.py` / `test_funasr_engine.py`，并补齐平台适配说明中的运行环境接入与失败可观测性口径。
+- 2026-03-29: 补跑完整 OpenClaw smoke checklist；`/health`、`/ready`、PowerShell wrapper、Node/OpenClaw helper、任务详情、artifacts 列表与成片/字幕/封面下载均验证通过。
+- 2026-03-29: 补齐任务级 `processing_log` 输出与 stage 级运行日志；真实 smoke 验证 `task_result.outputs.processing_log`、`render_manifest.logs.processing` 与 processing log artifact 下载链路全部可用。
*** End Patch

+时间: 2026-03-29 21:17:18
+用户: 指出当前 canonical 结果里没有完整日志不可接受，要求补齐“完整的、最佳实践的 log”。
+助手: 先按 MemoryTree 读取当前 goal/todo/chat 状态，随后用 `systematic-debugging` + `test-driven-development` 追查根因，确认并不是 `task_result` / `render_manifest` 映射缺失，而是内部视频主链真实运行时没有把处理日志落到任务目录，导致 artifact 收集链路拿不到 `processing_log`。先在 `tests/unit/test_worker_service.py` 新增真实 internal pipeline 运行后必须自动产出 `processing_log` artifact 的失败测试，再在 `apps/worker/service.py` 为每个视频任务挂接线程隔离的 task-local file handler，把日志写入 `output/<task_id>/logs/funclip_*.log`；同时在 `domain/video/pipeline.py` 补充 pipeline run / stage start / stage completed / stage failed 的显式日志事件。随后验证 `tests/unit/test_worker_service.py` 全量 33 例通过、`tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py` 全量 7 例通过；并两次对 `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` 跑真实 smoke，确认 `task_result.outputs.processing_log` 非空、`/api/tasks/<task_id>` 下 `render_manifest.logs.processing` 为 `processing_log`、`/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts` 中存在 `processing_log` artifact 且日志下载成功。真实 smoke 任务号分别为 `59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53` 与 `ecad4ee7-771a-47bc-ba97-efc318311f99`。
*** End Patch

我做了新回归测试并验证通过：
- .venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_worker_service.py -q：33 passed
- .venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py -q：7 passed

还跑了两次真实 smoke（D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4，2026-03-29）：
- 任务 59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53：task_result.outputs.processing_log 非空，artifact 下载成功，日志 8419 bytes，内容包含 stage start/completed 明细
- 任务 ecad4ee7-771a-47bc-ba97-efc318311f99：/api/tasks/<task_id> 下 render_manifest.logs.processing = "processing_log"，同时 outputs.processing_log 正常返回

Memory 也同步了，到 [todo_goal_v2_v5.md](d:/clonecut/Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v5.md) 和 [2026-03-29_211718.md](d:/clonecut/Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-29_211718.md)。我还没帮你提交，因为当前仓库里有无关脏区（比如 data/clonecut.db、janus/* 删除、.worktrees/ 等），按仓库规则不适合直接混着一起提。

D:\clonecut\output\59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53你看看你生成的内容和我们最终的一个需求能不能匹配上，因为我看和我们原来最初的那个旧版的是不一样的，只是说现在改成新版了，我不知道。你是不是按新版的逻辑生成的？因为我们这里涉及到带字幕的视频，然后只剪切的视频，然后加封面的视频等等，好多这个逻辑在里边，我不知道你有没有。嗯，遵循这个来，按理说应该是遵循这个来的才行，就我们以前那个逻辑，你看一看，你通过 Git 查看一下，还是说你我们这个逻辑是在你预想之中

assistant #1613 commentary 14:44:53

我已经看到一个很关键的信号了：新版主链“阶段执行”其实是有的，stage6_clip、stage7_subtitle、stage8_cover 都跑了，但这次真实产物里没有把它们按旧版那种“无字幕版 / 带字幕版 / 无封面文字版”的稳定命名收口出来，所以 API 里这几个输出位现在是空的。我再把旧链的 stage6/7/8/9 命名和整理逻辑拉出来，对照给你一个明确判断。

Output:
    1: from __future__ import annotations
    2: 
    3: import json
    4: import os
    5: from pathlib import Path
    6: import shutil
    7: import subprocess
    8: from typing import Any
    9: 
   10: from .base import StageResult
   11: from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, probe_duration_seconds, stage_artifact_path
   12: 
   13: 
   14: def ffmpeg_exists() -> bool:
   15:     return shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None
   16: 
   17: 
   18: def run_ffmpeg(args: list[str], timeout_seconds: int = 1800) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   19:     try:
   20:         completed = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_seconds, check=False)
   21:         if completed.returncode == 0:
   22:             return True, ""
   23:         return False, completed.stderr or completed.stdout or f"exit={completed.returncode}"
   24:     except Exception as exc:
   25:         return False, str(exc)
   26: 
   27: 
   28: def _build_clip_ranges(
   29:     *,
   30:     subtitle_path: Path,
   31:     video_duration: float,
   32:     max_duration: float = 0.0,
   33:     target_speaker: str = "",
   34: ) -> tuple[list[tuple[float, float]], str]:
   35:     if not subtitle_path.exists():
   36:         return ([(0.0, max(0.1, float(video_duration or 1.0)))], "merged=1 missing_subtitle")
   37:     text = subtitle_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
   38:     # Minimal deterministic shape: split by subtitle blocks and create simple 1s ranges.
   39:     blocks = [item for item in text.split("\n\n") if item.strip()]
   40:     ranges: list[tuple[float, float]] = []
   41:     matched = 0
   42:     total = 0
   43:     cursor = 0.0
   44:     for block in blocks:
   45:         lines = [line.strip() for line in block.splitlines() if line.strip()]
   46:         if len(lines) < 3:
   47:             continue
   48:         total += 1
   49:         content = " ".join(lines[2:]).strip()
   50:         if target_speaker and f"[{target_speaker}]" not in content:
   51:             continue
   52:         matched += 1
   53:         ranges.append((cursor, min(cursor + 1.0, float(video_duration or 1.0))))
   54:         cursor += 1.5
   55:     if not ranges:
   56:         ranges = [(0.0, min(1.0, float(video_duration or 1.0)))]
   57:     if max_duration and max_duration > 0:
   58:         limited: list[tuple[float, float]] = []
   59:         spent = 0.0
   60:         for start, end in ranges:
   61:             dur = max(0.0, end - start)
   62:             if spent + dur <= max_duration:
   63:                 limited.append((start, end))
   64:                 spent += dur
   65:                 continue
   66:             remain = max_duration - spent
   67:             if remain > 0:
   68:                 limited.append((start, start + remain))
   69:             break
   70:         ranges = limited or ranges[:1]
   71:     detail = f"merged={len(ranges)}"
   72:     if target_speaker:
   73:         detail += f" speaker_filter target={target_speaker} matched={matched}/{max(total,1)}"
   74:     return ranges, detail
   75: 
   76: 
   77: def _render_trim_seconds(source: Path, target: Path, target_seconds: float) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   78:     codec = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_VIDEO_CODEC", "").strip() or os.getenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_CODEC", "").strip()
   79:     codec = codec or "libx264"
   80:     cmd = ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-t", f"{target_seconds:.3f}", "-c:v", codec, str(target)]
   81:     ok, err = run_ffmpeg(cmd)
   82:     if ok:
   83:         return True, ""
   84:     if codec.endswith("_nvenc") and "nvenc" in err.lower():
   85:         cmd = ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-t", f"{target_seconds:.3f}", "-c:v", "libx264", str(target)]
   86:         return run_ffmpeg(cmd)
   87:     return False, err
   88: 
   89: 
   90: def _resolve_clip_text_input(output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
   91:     env_path = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_CLIP_TEXT_PATH", "").strip()
   92:     candidate_paths: list[Path] = []
   93:     if env_path:
   94:         candidate_paths.append(Path(env_path))
   95:     candidate_paths.append(Path(output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt")
   96: 
   97:     for path in candidate_paths:
   98:         if not path.exists() or not path.is_file():
   99:             continue
  100:         try:
  101:             return path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), str(path)
  102:         except Exception:
  103:             continue
  104:     return "", ""
  105: 
  106: 
  107: def run_stage6_clip(input_video: str, output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> StageResult:
  108:     source = Path(input_video)
  109:     stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
  110:     if not source.exists():
  111:         return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage6 input missing")
  112: 
  113:     manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_clip_manifest", ".json")
  114:     out_copy = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_clip_copy", ".mp4")
  115:     strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
  116:     payload: dict[str, Any] = {
  117:         "task_id": task_id,
  118:         "method": "copy_fallback",
  119:         "fallback_used": False,
  120:         "strict_rejected": False,
  121:         "detail": "",
  122:     }
  123: 
  124:     guide_path = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_DURATION_GUIDE_PATH", "").strip()
  125:     clip_text_match = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_CLIP_TEXT_MATCH", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
  126:     subtitle_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_subtitles", ".srt")
  127:     stage4_manifest = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_manifest", ".json")
  128:     target_speaker = ""
  129:     if stage4_manifest.exists():
  130:         try:
  131:             target_speaker = str(json.loads(stage4_manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("speaker", "")).strip()
  132:         except Exception:
  133:             target_speaker = ""
  134: 
  135:     if ffmpeg_exists():
  136:         out_clip = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_clip", ".mp4")
  137:         if guide_path:
  138:             seconds = probe_duration_seconds(guide_path)
  139:             ok, err = _render_trim_seconds(source=source, target=out_clip, target_seconds=max(0.1, seconds))
  140:             if ok:
  141:                 payload["method"] = "duration_guide_trim"
  142:                 manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  143:                 return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
  144:             payload["error"] = err
  145:         elif clip_text_match:
  146:             clip_text, clip_text_source = _resolve_clip_text_input(output_dir=output_dir, task_id=task_id)
  147:             payload["clip_text_used"] = bool(clip_text.strip())
  148:             payload["clip_text_source"] = clip_text_source
  149:             if not payload["clip_text_used"]:
  150:                 payload["fallback_used"] = True
  151:                 payload["detail"] = "clip_text_missing"
  152:                 if strict:
  153:                     payload["method"] = "strict_rejected"
  154:                     payload["strict_rejected"] = True
  155:                     manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  156:                     return StageResult(
  157:                         success=False,
  158:                         output_file=str(source),
  159:                         error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage6 clip_text fallback",
  160:                     )
  161:                 ranges, detail = _build_clip_ranges(
  162:                     subtitle_path=subtitle_path,
  163:                     video_duration=max(1.0, probe_duration_seconds(input_video)),
  164:                     max_duration=0.0,
  165:                     target_speaker=target_speaker,
  166:                 )
  167:                 payload["detail"] = f"{payload['detail']} {detail}".strip()
  168:                 ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-c", "copy", str(out_clip)])
  169:                 if ok:
  170:                     payload["method"] = "subtitle_concat"
  171:                     payload["ranges"] = ranges
  172:                     manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  173:                     return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
  174:                 payload["error"] = err
  175:                 payload["method"] = "copy_fallback"
  176:             else:
  177:                 ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-c", "copy", str(out_clip)])
  178:                 if ok:
  179:                     payload["method"] = "subtitle_clip_text_concat"
  180:                     manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  181:                     return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
  182:                 payload["error"] = err
  183:         else:
  184:             ranges, detail = _build_clip_ranges(
  185:                 subtitle_path=subtitle_path,
  186:                 video_duration=max(1.0, probe_duration_seconds(input_video)),
  187:                 max_duration=0.0,
  188:                 target_speaker=target_speaker,
  189:             )
  190:             payload["detail"] = detail
  191:             ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-c", "copy", str(out_clip)])
  192:             if ok:
  193:                 payload["method"] = "subtitle_concat" if target_speaker else "subtitle_concat"
  194:                 payload["ranges"] = ranges
  195:                 manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  196:                 return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
  197:             payload["error"] = err
  198: 
  199:     payload["fallback_used"] = True
  200:     if strict:
  201:         payload["method"] = "strict_rejected"
  202:         payload["strict_rejected"] = True
  203:         manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  204:         return StageResult(success=False, output_file=str(source), error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage6 fallback")
  205: 
  206:     shutil.copyfile(source, out_copy)
  207:     manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  208:     return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_copy))
  209: 
  210: 
  211: def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
  212:     return run_stage6_clip(*args, **kwargs)

   14: def ffmpeg_exists() -> bool:
   15:     return shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None
   16: 
   17: 
   18: def run_ffmpeg(args: list[str], timeout_seconds: int = 1800) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   19:     try:
   20:         completed = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_seconds, check=False)

   28: def _probe_video_resolution(_source: Path) -> tuple[int, int]:
   29:     return (1280, 720)
   30: 
   31: 
   32: def run_stage7_subtitle(input_video: str, output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> StageResult:
   33:     source = Path(input_video)
   34:     ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
   35:     if not source.exists():
   36:         return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage7_subtitle input missing")
   37: 
   38:     stage_dir = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_subtitle_manifest", ".json").parent
   39:     subtitle_ass = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_5_resub_subtitles", ".ass")
   40:     subtitle_srt = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_correct_subtitles", ".srt")
   41:     if not subtitle_srt.exists():
   42:         subtitle_srt = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_5_resub_subtitles", ".srt")
   43: 
   44:     output = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_subtitle", ".mp4")
   45:     manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_subtitle_manifest", ".json")
   46:     mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "auto").strip().lower()
   47:     strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
   48: 
   49:     method = "copy_fallback"
   50:     fallback_used = False
   51:     if ffmpeg_exists() and (mode in {"auto", "burn"}):
   52:         vf_expr = ""
   53:         if subtitle_ass.exists():
   54:             vf_expr = f"ass={subtitle_ass}"
   55:         else:
   56:             _, h = _probe_video_resolution(source)
   57:             font_size = max(24, int(round(h * 0.05)))
   58:             vf_expr = f"subtitles={subtitle_srt}:force_style='Fontsize={font_size}'"
   59:         ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-vf", vf_expr, str(output)])
   60:         if ok and output.exists():
   61:             method = "burn_subtitle"
   62:             manifest_path.write_text(
   63:                 json.dumps({"task_id": task_id, "method": method, "vf_expr": vf_expr}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
   64:                 encoding="utf-8",
   65:             )
   66:             return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(output))
   67:         fallback_used = True
   68:     else:
   69:         fallback_used = True
   70: 
   71:     if strict and fallback_used:
   72:         manifest_path.write_text(
   73:             json.dumps(
   74:                 {"task_id": task_id, "method": "strict_rejected", "fallback_used": True},
   75:                 ensure_ascii=False,
   76:                 indent=2,
   77:             ),
   78:             encoding="utf-8",
   79:         )
   80:         return StageResult(success=False, output_file=str(source), error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage7 fallback")
   81: 
   82:     shutil.copyfile(source, output)
   83:     manifest_path.write_text(
   84:         json.dumps({"task_id": task_id, "method": method, "fallback_used": fallback_used}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
   85:         encoding="utf-8",
   86:     )
   87:     return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(output))
   88: 
   89: 
   90: def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
   91:     return run_stage7_subtitle(*args, **kwargs)

   14: 
   15: def ffmpeg_exists() -> bool:
   16:     return shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None

   19: def run_ffmpeg(args: list[str], timeout_seconds: int = 1800) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   20:     try:
   21:         completed = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_seconds, check=False)

   28: 
   29: def _render_title_overlay_image(output_path: str, width: int, height: int, lines: list[str]) -> tuple[bool, str]:
   30:     # Deterministic placeholder image artifact for compatibility-only phase.
   31:     payload = f"overlay {width}x{height} {' | '.join(lines)}".encode("utf-8")
   32:     Path(output_path).write_bytes(payload)
   33:     return True, ""
   34: 
   35: 
   36: def run_stage8_cover(
   37:     input_video: str,
   38:     output_dir: str,
   39:     task_id: str,
   40:     *,
   41:     forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
   42: ) -> StageResult:
   43:     source = Path(input_video)
   44:     stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
   45:     if not source.exists():
   46:         return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage8 input missing")
   47: 
   48:     info = forum_post_info or {}
   49:     raw_cover_titles = info.get("cover_titles") if isinstance(info.get("cover_titles"), list) else []
   50:     cover_titles: list[str] = []
   51:     for item in raw_cover_titles:
   52:         if isinstance(item, dict):
   53:             text = str(item.get("text", "")).strip()
   54:         else:
   55:             text = str(item or "").strip()
   56:         if text:
   57:             cover_titles.append(text)
   58:     if not cover_titles:
   59:         for key in ("cover_title_up", "封面标题上", "cover_title_middle", "封面标题中", "cover_title_down", "封面标题下"):
   60:             text = str(info.get(key, "")).strip()
   61:             if text:
   62:                 cover_titles.append(text)
   63: 
   64:     title_txt = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover_title", ".txt")
   65:     title_txt.write_text("\n".join(cover_titles) + ("\n" if cover_titles else ""), encoding="utf-8")
   66:     output_video = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover", ".mp4")
   67:     overlay_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover_overlay", ".png")
   68:     subtitle_for_timing = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_correct_subtitles", ".srt")
   69:     if not subtitle_for_timing.exists():
   70:         subtitle_for_timing = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_5_resub_subtitles", ".srt")
   71: 
   72:     method = "title_text_only"
   73:     overlay_duration_seconds = 0.0
   74:     fallback_used = False
   75:     strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
   76:     overlay_rendered = False
   77:     overlay_render_error = ""
   78:     overlay_ok, overlay_err = _render_title_overlay_image(str(overlay_path), 1280, 720, cover_titles)
   79:     if overlay_ok and overlay_path.exists():
   80:         overlay_rendered = True
   81:     elif overlay_err:
   82:         overlay_render_error = str(overlay_err)
   83: 
   84:     if ffmpeg_exists() and overlay_rendered:
   85:         overlay_duration_seconds = 1.7 if subtitle_for_timing.exists() else 2.0
   86:         filter_expr = f"[0:v][1:v]overlay=0:0:enable='between(t,0,{overlay_duration_seconds:.3f})'"
   87:         ok, err = run_ffmpeg(
   88:             ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-i", str(overlay_path), "-filter_complex", filter_expr, str(output_video)]
   89:         )
   90:         if ok and output_video.exists():
   91:             method = "video_title_overlay"
   92:         else:
   93:             fallback_used = True
   94:             shutil.copyfile(source, output_video)
   95:     else:
   96:         fallback_used = True
   97:         if ffmpeg_exists() and not overlay_rendered:
   98:             method = "overlay_render_failed"
   99:         if strict:
  100:             method = "strict_rejected"
  101:         else:
  102:             shutil.copyfile(source, output_video)
  103: 
  104:     strict_rejected = strict and fallback_used
  105:     payload = {
  106:         "task_id": task_id,
  107:         "cover_titles": cover_titles,
  108:         "cover_title_lines": cover_titles,
  109:         "cover_title_up": str(info.get("cover_title_up", "")),
  110:         "cover_title_middle": str(info.get("cover_title_middle", "")),
  111:         "cover_title_down": str(info.get("cover_title_down", "")),
  112:         "封面标题上": str(info.get("封面标题上", "")),
  113:         "封面标题中": str(info.get("封面标题中", "")),
  114:         "封面标题下": str(info.get("封面标题下", "")),
  115:         "method": method,
  116:         "fallback_used": fallback_used,
  117:         "strict_rejected": strict_rejected,
  118:         "overlay_duration_seconds": overlay_duration_seconds,
  119:         "overlay_rendered": overlay_rendered,
  120:         "overlay_render_error": overlay_render_error,
  121:         "overlay_path": str(overlay_path) if overlay_rendered else "",
  122:     }
  123:     manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage8_cover_manifest", ".json")
  124:     manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
  125:     return StageResult(
  126:         success=not strict_rejected,
  127:         output_file=str(output_video if output_video.exists() else source),
  128:         error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage8 fallback" if strict_rejected else None,
  129:         artifacts={"manifest_file": str(manifest_path), "title_file": str(title_txt)},
  130:     )
  131: 
  132: 
  133: def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
  134:     return run_stage8_cover(*args, **kwargs)

    1: #!/usr/bin/env python3
    2: # -*- encoding: utf-8 -*-

    5: 
    6: """
    7: 视频处理流水线 - 阶段9：文件整理
    8: 
    9: 主要功能：
   10: - 将output目录中生成的处理后视频文件剪切到以原始视频文件名命名的子文件夹中
   11: - 帮助用户更好地组织和管理处理后的视频文件
   12: """
   13: 
   14: import os
   15: import sys
   16: import logging
   17: import glob
   18: import shutil
   19: import re
   20: import time
   21: import json
   22: from datetime import datetime
   23: 
   24: # 尝试释放所有日志处理程序，防止文件锁定
   25: for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
   26:     logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
   27:     if logger.handlers:
   28:         for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
   29:             logger.removeHandler(handler)
   30:             if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
   31:                 handler.close()
   32: 
   33: # 关闭根日志处理程序
   34: for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
   35:     logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
   36:     if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
   37:         handler.close()
   38: 
   39: # 导入工具函数
   40: sys.path.append(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
   41: from utils import input_with_timeout
   42: 
   43: # 确保日志不重复
   44: logger = logging.getLogger("stage9")
   45: # 如果有处理器，清除它们
   46: if logger.handlers:
   47:     logger.handlers.clear()
   48: # 禁用向上传播，防止消息传递到父记录器
   49: logger.propagate = False
   50: 
   51: def clean_filename(filename):
   52:     """
   53:     清理文件名，去除特定的后缀
   54:     """
   55:     # 移除 "_智能剪辑带字幕版_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS" 格式的后缀
   56:     filename = re.sub(r'_智能剪辑带字幕版_\d{8}_\d{6}$', '', filename)
   57:     # 移除 "_智能剪辑带字幕版" 后缀
   58:     filename = re.sub(r'_智能剪辑带字幕版$', '', filename)
   59:     # 移除 "_智能识别字幕版" 后缀
   60:     filename = re.sub(r'_智能识别字幕版$', '', filename)
   61:     # 移除 "_final" 后缀
   62:     filename = re.sub(r'_final$', '', filename)
   63:     return filename
   64: 
   65: 
   66: def _force_delete_dir(dir_path):
   67:     """
   68:     尝试使用系统命令删除目录，但绝不全局结束 Python 进程。
   69:     """
   70:     time.sleep(1)
   71:     if os.name == 'nt':
   72:         return os.system(f'rmdir /S /Q "{dir_path}"')
   73:     return os.system(f'rm -rf "{dir_path}"')
   74: 
   75: def extract_original_filename(output_dir):
   76:     """
   77:     从state.json文件中读取原始视频文件名
   78:     
   79:     Args:
   80:         output_dir: 输出目录路径
   81:         
   82:     Returns:
   83:         str: 提取出的原始文件名
   84:     """
   85:     # 读取state.json文件
   86:     state_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "state.json")
   87:     
   88:     if not os.path.exists(state_json_path):
   89:         print(f"错误: 找不到state.json文件: {state_json_path}")
   90:         return None
   91:     
   92:     try:
   93:         with open(state_json_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   94:             state_data = json.load(f)
   95:         
   96:         # 检查是否有original_video_name字段且不为null
   97:         if 'original_video_name' in state_data and state_data['original_video_name']:
   98:             original_name = state_data['original_video_name']
   99:             return clean_filename(original_name)
  100:         
  101:         # 优先尝试从步骤映射中找到最早的有效输入文件
  102:         if 'steps_mapping' in state_data:
  103:             # 获取所有步骤号，并尝试转换为浮点数进行排序
  104:             step_keys = []
  105:             for key in state_data['steps_mapping'].keys():
  106:                 try:
  107:                     step_keys.append(float(key))
  108:                 except ValueError:
  109:                     continue  # 忽略无法转换为数字的键
  110:             
  111:             # 从小到大排序步骤号
  112:             step_keys.sort()
  113:             
  114:             for step_key in step_keys:
  115:                 # 将浮点数转回字符串key (处理6.5这样的key)
  116:                 str_key = str(step_key)
  117:                 if str_key.endswith('.0'):
  118:                     str_key = str(int(step_key))
  119: 
  120:                 step_info = state_data['steps_mapping'].get(str_key)
  121:                 # 检查是否是有效的步骤信息且包含有效的输入文件
  122:                 if step_info and 'input_file' in step_info and step_info['input_file']:
  123:                     # 找到了第一个有输入文件的步骤
  124:                     input_file = step_info['input_file']
  125:                     basename = os.path.basename(input_file)
  126:                     name_without_ext = os.path.splitext(basename)[0]
  127:                     print(f"从步骤 {str_key} 的输入文件提取原始视频名称: {name_without_ext}")
  128:                     return clean_filename(name_without_ext)
  129:         
  130:         # 如果没有找到步骤1的信息，尝试从input_file字段获取文件名
  131:         if 'input_file' in state_data and state_data['input_file']:
  132:             # 获取原始输入文件的基本名称（不包括路径）
  133:             input_file = state_data['input_file']
  134:             basename = os.path.basename(input_file)
  135:             # 移除扩展名
  136:             name_without_ext = os.path.splitext(basename)[0]
  137:             print(f"警告: state.json中没有原始视频名称信息，从当前input_file提取: {name_without_ext}")
  138:             return clean_filename(name_without_ext)
  139:     
  140:     except Exception as e:
  141:         print(f"读取state.json时出错: {str(e)}")
  142:     
  143:     print("错误: 无法从state.json获取原始视频名称")
  144:     return None
  145: 
  146: def step9_organize_files(input_video, config):
  147:     """第九步：将处理后的文件剪切到以原始视频名命名的子文件夹"""
  148:     # 尝试释放所有日志处理程序，防止文件锁定
  149:     for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
  150:         logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
  151:         if logger.handlers:
  152:             for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
  153:                 logger.removeHandler(handler)
  154:                 if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
  155:                     handler.close()
  156:     
  157:     # 关闭根日志处理程序
  158:     for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
  159:         logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
  160:         if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
  161:             handler.close()
  162:             
  163:     logger.info("开始执行步骤9: 文件整理")
  164:     print("\n===== 步骤9: 文件整理 =====")
  165:     
  166:     output_dir = config.get("output_dir", "output")
  167:     
  168:     # 获取是否删除原始文件的配置，默认为False（不删除）
  169:     delete_original = config.get("organize_delete_original", False)
  170:     
  171:     # 显示操作类型
  172:     operation_type = "移动" if delete_original else "复制"
  173:     print(f"文件整理模式: {operation_type}文件到子文件夹")
  174:     logger.info(f"文件整理模式: {operation_type}文件到子文件夹，是否删除原始文件: {delete_original}")
  175:     
  176:     # 从state.json获取原始文件名
  177:     original_filename = extract_original_filename(output_dir)
  178:     
  179:     if not original_filename:
  180:         print("错误: 无法获取原始视频文件名，中止处理")
  181:         return False, input_video
  182:     
  183:     print(f"原始视频文件名: {original_filename}")
  184:     
  185:     # 创建以原始文件名命名的子文件夹
  186:     target_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, original_filename)
  187:     os.makedirs(target_dir, exist_ok=True)
  188:     print(f"创建目标文件夹: {target_dir}")
  189:     
  190:     # 获取output目录中的所有文件（非文件夹）
  191:     all_files = []
  192:     exclude_files = [".gitkeep", "README.md"]
  193:     
  194:     for item in os.listdir(output_dir):
  195:         item_path = os.path.join(output_dir, item)
  196:         # 只处理文件，不处理文件夹
  197:         if os.path.isfile(item_path) and item not in exclude_files:
  198:             # 检查文件是否在目标文件夹中（使用精确的目录比较）
  199:             if os.path.dirname(item_path) != target_dir:
  200:                 all_files.append(item_path)
  201:     
  202:     total_files = len(all_files)
  203:     
  204:     if total_files == 0:
  205:         print(f"未找到任何文件需要整理")
  206:         # 即使没有文件，我们仍然会处理文件夹
  207:     else:
  208:         print(f"找到 {total_files} 个文件需要整理")
  209:         print(f"\n将{operation_type}这些文件到子文件夹...")
  210:     
  211:         # 复制或移动文件到目标文件夹
  212:         processed_count = 0
  213:         for file_path in all_files:
  214:             if os.path.isfile(file_path):
  215:                 filename = os.path.basename(file_path)
  216:                 target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, filename)
  217:                 
  218:                 # 检查目标文件是否已存在
  219:                 if os.path.exists(target_path):
  220:                     # 生成一个带时间戳的新名称
  221:                     timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
  222:                     name, ext = os.path.splitext(filename)
  223:                     new_filename = f"{name}_{timestamp}{ext}"
  224:                     target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, new_filename)
  225:                 
  226:                 try:
  227:                     # 根据配置选择复制或移动
  228:                     if delete_original:
  229:                         # 移动文件
  230:                         shutil.move(file_path, target_path)
  231:                         processed_count += 1
  232:                         print(f"已移动: {filename} -> {target_dir}/{os.path.basename(target_path)}")
  233:                     else:
  234:                         # 复制文件
  235:                         shutil.copy2(file_path, target_path)
  236:                         processed_count += 1
  237:                         print(f"已复制: {filename} -> {target_dir}/{os.path.basename(target_path)}")
  238:                 except Exception as e:
  239:                     print(f"{operation_type}文件 {filename} 时出错: {str(e)}")
  240:         
  241:         print(f"\n文件整理完成! 成功{operation_type} {processed_count}/{total_files} 个文件到 {target_dir}")
  242:     
  243:     # 处理logs和temp文件夹
  244:     directories_to_copy = ["logs", "temp"]
  245:     processed_dirs_count = 0
  246:     
  247:     print(f"\n开始{operation_type} logs和temp文件夹...")
  248:     
  249:     for dir_name in directories_to_copy:
  250:         source_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, dir_name)
  251:         target_subdir = os.path.join(target_dir, dir_name)
  252:         
  253:         # 检查源目录是否存在
  254:         if os.path.exists(source_dir) and os.path.isdir(source_dir):
  255:             try:
  256:                 # 如果目标文件夹已存在，先备份或删除它
  257:                 if os.path.exists(target_subdir):
  258:                     backup_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
  259:                     backup_dir = f"{target_subdir}_{backup_timestamp}_bak"
  260:                     print(f"目标文件夹 {dir_name} 已存在，重命名为: {os.path.basename(backup_dir)}")
  261:                     os.rename(target_subdir, backup_dir)
  262:                 
  263:                 # 复制整个文件夹及其内容
  264:                 print(f"正在{operation_type}文件夹: {dir_name}...")
  265:                 shutil.copytree(source_dir, target_subdir)
  266:                 processed_dirs_count += 1
  267:                 print(f"已{operation_type}: {dir_name} -> {target_dir}/{dir_name}")
  268:                 
  269:                 # 如果设置为删除原始文件，并且是复制模式，则在复制完成后删除原始文件夹
  270:                 if delete_original:
  271:                     try:
  272:                         print(f"正在删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
  273:                         shutil.rmtree(source_dir)
  274:                         print(f"已删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
  275:                     except Exception as e:
  276:                         print(f"删除原始文件夹 {dir_name} 时出错: {str(e)}")
  277:                         # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
  278:                         try:
  279:                             _force_delete_dir(source_dir)
  280:                             print(f"使用系统命令成功删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")

assistant #1653 final_answer 14:50:41

公允判断：**现在这次产物只“部分符合”旧版最终需求，不是完全对齐**。它确实是在走新版主链，但新版当前实现还没有把旧版那套“用户可见成品语义”完整补回来。 **我核对后的结论** - 对齐的部分：阶段顺序是对的，确实有“剪辑 -> 字幕 -> 封面 -> 整理”这条链。[stage6_clip.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/stages/stage6_clip.py#L107) 、[stage7_su...

Expand full message

公允判断：现在这次产物只“部分符合”旧版最终需求，不是完全对齐。它确实是在走新版主链，但新版当前实现还没有把旧版那套“用户可见成品语义”完整补回来。

我核对后的结论
- 对齐的部分：阶段顺序是对的，确实有“剪辑 -> 字幕 -> 封面 -> 整理”这条链。[stage6_clip.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/stages/stage6_clip.py#L107) 、[stage7_subtitle.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/stages/stage7_subtitle.py#L32) 、[stage8_cover.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/stages/stage8_cover.py#L36) 、[stage9_organize.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/stages/stage9_organize.py#L13)
- 不完全对齐的部分：这次真实任务目录 [59db...](d:/clonecut/output/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53) 里虽然有 _stages/...stage6_clip_copy.mp4、_stages/...stage7_subtitle.mp4、_stages/...stage8_cover.mp4，但没有被收口成旧版那种稳定成品名，比如“无字幕版 / 带字幕版 / 无封面文字版”。
- 更关键的是，这次实际运行里：
- stage6 manifest 是 copy_fallback：[stage6_clip_manifest.json](d:/clonecut/output/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53/_stages/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53_stage6_clip_manifest.json)
- stage7 manifest 也是 copy_fallback：[stage7_subtitle_manifest.json](d:/clonecut/output/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53/_stages/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53_stage7_subtitle_manifest.json)
- stage8 没有封面标题，cover_titles=[]，而且是 placeholder overlay：[stage8_cover_manifest.json](d:/clonecut/output/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53/_stages/59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53_stage8_cover_manifest.json) ，实现里也明确写了 compatibility-only placeholder。[stage8_cover.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/stages/stage8_cover.py#L29)
- 旧版逻辑里，这些语义是明确存在的：
- 无字幕剪辑版：[stage6.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/pre/stage/stage6.py#L345)
- 带字幕版：[stage7.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/pre/stage/stage7.py#L363)
- 带封面标题版和“无封面文字可自由添加”版：[stage8.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/pre/stage/stage8.py#L1324) 和 [stage8.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/pre/stage/stage8.py#L1354)
- stage9 会整理 logs/temp 和整批文件：[stage9.py](d:/clonecut/domain/video/pre/stage/stage9.py#L243)
- 现在的 worker 其实还在按旧语义识别这些文件名，说明设计上本来就想兼容这套产物语义，只是生成端还没完全补齐。[service.py](d:/clonecut/apps/worker/service.py#L2311)

所以结论很直接
- 这不是我这次“补日志”造成的新问题。
- 这也不是“我误会了逻辑”。
- 这是当前新版主链本身的真实状态：主链顺序和 canonical 契约先打通了，但旧版用户侧成品语义还没有完全 parity。

如果按你的标准，“最终必须保留旧版那套 无字幕版 / 带字幕版 / 封面版 / 无封面版 的交付语义”，那这件事现在还没做完。下一步最应该补的，不是文档，而是把 stage6/7/8/9 的最终产物命名和整理逻辑补齐。

user #1658 15:19:30

需要补齐，因为后期我们在通过OpenClaw这个小龙虾，然后通过自然语言，在对我们的视频进行修改的时候，比如说修改字幕、修改封面，或者在二次剪辑的时候，都是非常关键的。这些产物我们需要有一个命名上的一个区分，所以说必须对齐。
